title: London tube strikes set to go ahead unless last-ditch talks deliver breakthrough
summary_full: London Underground strikes loom as RMT union leaders warn walkouts will proceed unless Transport for London (TfL) offers a breakthrough in emergency negotiations. The dispute centers on pay, working conditions, and staffing, with millions of passengers facing potential disruption if talks fail. Both sides are engaged in crucial discussions to avert widespread travel chaos across the capital.
